clean_justification: Both rubrics satisfied. code-vs-spec: all three prescribed patches to handoff-v2-final-state-plan-brief.md were applied and match the spec exactly. (1) Compositions-per-tier table now carries a 'Live value (R4)' column mapping narrow->decisive, mid->shapeable, broad->exploratory, overwhelming->intractable (diff lines around 71-84), identical to the ratified table tier-vocabulary-reconciliation.md:28-31 and plan checklist lines 315-318. (2) Architecture ASCII block annotates the R2 line with '(live/R4: decisive | shapeable | exploratory | intractable -- see tier-vocabulary-reconciliation.md)', order-preserving 1:1 (diff ~line 46), per spec line 64. (3) Framing question 3 struck through and marked RESOLVED pointing to tier-vocabulary-reconciliation.md (diff line 22), per spec line 65. constraint-compliance: NO forbidden edits -- git diff confirms docs/_handoff-pack/* untouched (empty name-only diff), no canonical_enums.py / tier_signal_computer.py / test file edits, no live-value renames. The conversational-search and luigisbox-ai diff entries are submodule-gitlink-to-symlink worktree-wiring type changes (mode 160000->120000), not content edits. The two .py files in the diff are .claude/hooks/ deletions (apparatus pruning), unrelated to tier vocabulary. No constraint file under .claude/knowledge/constraints/ carries a globs: pattern matching docs/v2-design/*.md, so D-constraint-compliance applies-to-none for this docs target. The patched mapping matches the ratified mapping exactly with no renames.
